data.title: AngloGold Ashanti reports Q2 2025 earnings and free cash flow more than doubled year on year, with $535m generated.
data.description: AngloGold Ashanti plc reported a significant increase in earnings and free cash flow in Q2 2025, with both metrics more than doubling year on year. This growth was largely attributed to a 21% rise in gold production, alongside sustained cost management efforts and a favorable average gold price per ounce. The Company's managed operations delivered a robust performance, contributing to a notable $535 million in free cash flow for the quarter, marking a 149% surge from the previous year's $215 million.

data.title: Atombeat Inc and BioDuro partner to launch an AI platform for peptide drug discovery. Collaboration announced on July 30, 2025.
data.description: In San Diego on August 1, 2025, Atombeat Inc., a prominent AI-driven drug discovery company, and BioDuro, a respected Contract Research, Development, and Manufacturing Organization (CRDMO) on July 30, 2025, revealed a key partnership. The collaboration aims to create an AI platform for drug discovery. This union brings together Atombeat Inc.'s expertise in AI with BioDuro's extensive experience in research, development, and manufacturing. Together, they plan to leverage the power of AI to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of drug discovery processes.

data.title: Weekly recap of 13 finance press releases, including PayPal's new crypto payment solution and Bank of America's 2025 financial education study results.
data.description: This week, significant financial updates were reported by PR Newswire, such as the introduction of a fresh cryptocurrency payment system by PayPal and findings from Bank of America's 2025 study on Better Money Habits. The report unveiled crucial insights, indicating a shifting landscape in financial transactions. This heralds a new era in digital finance, exemplified by PayPal's innovative approach. Bank of America's study, focusing on financial education, highlighted essential data points, shedding light on prevalent trends in financial behavior. The launch of the cryptocurrency payment solution is poised to revolutionize online transactions, as indicated by the increasing adoption rates. Additionally, Bank of America's study provides valuable insights, with figures suggesting a growing interest in financial literacy and planning among individuals. Overall, these developments underscore the dynamic nature of the financial sector and hint at the direction in which financial services are evolving.

data.title: Avantor reports Q2 2025 results: Net sales $1.68B, decrease of 1%; net income $65M; adjusted EBITDA $280M.
data.description: RADNOR, Pa. - On August 1, 2025, a company reported a net sales of $1.68 billion, showing a 1% decrease in comparison to the previous period. The organic revenue remained stable during this time. The net income was recorded at $65 million, while the Adjusted EBITDA stood at $280 million. The diluted GAAP EPS was $0.09, with the adjusted EPS being higher at $0.24. The company also generated an operating cash flow of $154 million and a free cash flow of $125 million.

data.title: Pembina Pipeline and AltaGas Ltd. sign new agreement for 30,000 bpd LPG export capacity, diversifying end markets.
data.description: Pembina Pipeline Corporation revealed a new long-term agreement with AltaGas Ltd., ensuring further end-market diversification for both companies. The agreement includes a long-term tolling arrangement for 30,000 barrels per day of liquified petroleum gases export capacity at AltaGas. This collaboration, marked by competitiveness, is expected to benefit Pembina and its clientele significantly.

data.title: Organigram (NASDAQ: OGI) to report Q3 fiscal 2025 results on August 13, 2025. Company claimed as Canada's #1 cannabis with earnings data released.
data.description: Organigram Global Inc. (NASDAQ: OGI) (TSX: OGI), the leading cannabis company in Canada by market share, is set to release its earnings report for the third quarter of fiscal 2025 ending on June 30, 2025. The disclosure will take place on Wednesday, August 13, 2025, before the markets open. A conference call will be held to review the results on the same day at 8:00 am Eastern Time. To participate in the call, registration details will be provided closer to the date.

data.title: XRP cloud mining potential earnings in 2025: Proceed with caution due to high risks despite profit possibilities.
data.description: In the year 2025, it will be feasible to engage in XRP cloud mining, although potential risks may overshadow the benefits. It is advisable to proceed with careful consideration due to the uncertainties associated with this practice.

data.title: AltaGas has strong Q2 2025 results, with $0.27 normalized EPS, $342M EBITDA. Midstream growth driven by 23% EBITDA increase. Utilities EBITDA up 10%. Adjusted net debt to normalized EBITDA at 4.6x. Upgrade projects underway. Maintaining 2025 guidance ($1.77B-$1.87B EBITDA, $2.10-$2.30 EPS). CEO optimistic about future prospects. Midstream segment strong with 23% EBITDA growth, focusing on North American exports. Utilities segment sees 10% EBITDA increase. Corporate/Other segment reports normalized EBITDA loss of $7M. Financial results show $342M EBITDA, $175M net income. Utilities investment leads to improved infrastructure.conomic future of the region depends on energy reliability and customer choice. News released on Benzinga.
data.description: AltaGas Ltd. reported its second quarter 2025 financial results, highlighting a normalized EPS of $0.27 in Q2 2025 compared to $0.14 in Q2 2024, with a normalized EBITDA of $342 million in Q2 2025 compared to $295 million in Q2 2024. The Midstream segment's EBITDA was $215 million in Q2 2025, up from $175 million in Q2 2024, driven by global exports and higher gas processing volumes. Utilities segment's EBITDA was $134 million in Q2 2025, up from $122 million in Q2 2024. AltaGas reported adjusted net debt to normalized EBITDA of 4.6x at the end of Q2 2025. Pipeline projects like REEF and Pipestone II were progressing as per schedule. AltaGas reiterated its 2025 full-year guidance with normalized EBITDA of $1.775 to $1.875 billion and normalized EPS of $2.10 to $2.30.CEO Vern Yu emphasized strong performance, strategic progress, and advancements in high-demand utilities and pipeline projects. Midstream exports to Asia were robust, with positive agreements signed with Keyera, Pembina, and BASF. AltaGas' future outlook appears positive with management confident in their long-term strategies. The Midstream and Utilities segments both showed year-over-year growth in EBITDA. The company actively manages risk through structured hedge programs. Additionally, AltaGas continues to invest in growth projects, with Utilities expanding in Michigan and plans to serve data center markets. Corporate/Other segment reported a loss in EBITDA due to increased employee incentive expenses. Consolidated financial results showed normalized net income of $81 million in Q2 2025. Full article available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: 75% US businesses lost profit due to tariffs, global research shows. Tariff volatility poses critical threat. (Char. count: 82)
data.description: In San Francisco, recent global research conducted among senior business leaders has unveiled that tariff volatility is posing a significant threat to business profitability. The study highlights the growing concerns surrounding the impact of fluctuating tariffs on companies worldwide. This finding underscores the urgency for businesses to navigate the challenges presented by unpredictable tariff changes to safeguard their financial stability and sustainability.

data.title: Fluor Corp (NYSE: FLR) reports Q2 2025 results, highlights LNG Canada project success, phase 2 expansion contract, and COVID claims settlement. CEO pleased with achievements.
data.description: In Irving, Texas, Fluor Corporation (NYSE: FLR) released its financial results for the second quarter ending on June 30, 2025. CEO Jim Breuer expressed satisfaction with the team's work on the LNG Canada project, highlighting the successful first shipment of LNG. Fluor also secured a contract for updating the FEED package for a potential phase 2 expansion. Additionally, an agreement on COVID claims and other issues was recently reached. Specific figures for earnings and project details were not provided.

data.title: Escalade, Inc. announces second quarter 2025 results, a leading sporting goods manufacturer.
data.description: Evansville, Indiana - On August 1, 2025, Escalade, Inc., a well-known company in the sporting goods and recreational equipment industry, released their second quarter results for 2025. The company, listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ESCA, reported significant achievements in this quarter compared to previous periods. Key highlights include notable increases in revenue and sales figures. They continue to solidify their position as a leading manufacturer and distributor in the market.

data.title: Houston Boston Partnership appoints Matt Keys as CFO for NetSuite ERP rollout, effective Aug 2, 2025. Fastest scaling auto repair platform in U.S.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, in Houston, the Houston Boston Partnership, the rapidly expanding independent auto repair platform in the United States, appointed Matt Keys, CPA as its new Chief Financial Officer (CFO) beginning August 2, 2025. This partnership, known for its quick growth, has been making strides in the industry, with a significant presence in the market.
